result: **Goal: Add a Doom-style First-Person Raycaster simulation mode** — a walkable 3D maze rendered in ASCII using classic raycasting (a la Wolfenstein 3D), with WASD movement, wall distance shading, minimap overlay, and multiple map presets (dungeon, office, outdoor ruins, etc.). This would be distinct from the existing SDF Ray Marching mode (which renders static mathematical shapes) by providing real-time player-navigable environments with collision detection and depth-based ASCII shading.
